Left winner: I none, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: AND 71-0 02-1 13-2 24-3 35-4 46-5 57-6 60-7 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8

1 AND 02
2 AND 13
3 AND 24
4 AND 35
5 AND 46
6 AND 57
7 AND 60

Applying to 01000100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 71 = AND(I 7,I 1) = AND(0,1) = 0
1 AND 02 = AND(I 0,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 13 = AND(I 1,I 3) = AND(1,0) = 0
3 AND 24 = AND(I 2,I 4) = AND(0,0) = 0
4 AND 35 = AND(I 3,I 5) = AND(0,1) = 0
5 AND 46 = AND(I 4,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
6 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(1,0) = 0
7 AND 60 = AND(I 6,I 0) = AND(0,0) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
